name: Lemlist
description: Lemlist is a sales engagement and outreach automation platform. Manage cold email campaigns, add and track leads through sequences, enrich contact data, send multi-channel messages (email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp), and monitor campaign performance.

capabilities.name: campaigns_list
capabilities.description: List all campaigns in your team.

capabilities.name: campaigns_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific campaign by ID.

capabilities.name: campaigns_create
capabilities.description: Create a new outreach campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_update
capabilities.description: Update campaign settings.

capabilities.name: campaigns_start
capabilities.description: Start or resume a paused campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_pause
capabilities.description: Pause a running campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_get_stats
capabilities.description: Get performance statistics for a campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_export
capabilities.description: Export campaign leads to CSV.

capabilities.name: leads_create
capabilities.description: Create a lead and add to a campaign.

capabilities.name: leads_list
capabilities.description: List leads in a campaign with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: leads_get
capabilities.description: Get a lead by email or ID.

capabilities.name: leads_update
capabilities.description: Update a lead in a campaign.

capabilities.name: leads_delete
capabilities.description: Delete or unsubscribe a lead.

capabilities.name: leads_pause
capabilities.description: Pause a lead in campaigns.

capabilities.name: leads_resume
capabilities.description: Resume a paused lead.

capabilities.name: leads_mark_interested
capabilities.description: Mark a lead as interested.

capabilities.name: leads_mark_not_interested
capabilities.description: Mark a lead as not interested.

capabilities.name: activities_list
capabilities.description: Get history of all campaign activities.

capabilities.name: enrichment_enrich
capabilities.description: Enrich data by finding emails, phones, or LinkedIn info.

capabilities.name: enrichment_bulk
capabilities.description: Batch enrich up to 500 entities.

capabilities.name: unsubscribes_list
capabilities.description: List all unsubscribed emails and domains.

capabilities.name: unsubscribes_add
capabilities.description: Add email or domain to unsubscribe list.

capabilities.name: unsubscribes_delete
capabilities.description: Remove email from unsubscribe list.

capabilities.name: team_get
capabilities.description: Get team information.

capabilities.name: team_get_credits
capabilities.description: Get remaining team credits.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: inbox_send_email
capabilities.description: Send an email through lemlist inbox.

capabilities.name: inbox_send_linkedin
capabilities.description: Send a LinkedIn message through lemlist.
